description: Required JSON shape for the APR26-ORTHO-B referral audit. Output JSON only. Arrays of referral objects must be sorted by referral_id unless otherwise stated.

batch.record_count: integer, count of referral rows audited
batch.unique_patient_count: integer, count of distinct patient_id values in the batch

laterality_or_narrative_mismatch_referra.mismatch_types: array of enum values: laterality_mismatch | narrative_mismatch | missing_laterality
laterality_or_narrative_mismatch_referra.expected_terms: array of strings from the ICD-10 directory

duplicate_groups.referral_ids: array of strings sorted by referral_id

insurance_patient_anomalies.patient_ids: array of patient_id strings sorted ascending
insurance_patient_anomalies.referral_ids: array of referral_id strings sorted ascending

follow_up_queues.authorization_missing: array of referral_id strings sorted ascending
follow_up_queues.authorization_pending: array of referral_id strings sorted ascending
follow_up_queues.records_request: array of referral_id strings sorted ascending for missing office-note records
follow_up_queues.imaging_follow_up: array of referral_id strings sorted ascending for missing required orthopedic imaging

ordering_rules.duplicate_groups: Sort by group_id ascending; referral_ids inside each group sorted ascending.
ordering_rules.insurance_patient_anomalies: Sort by anomaly_id ascending; ids inside each anomaly sorted ascending.
